title: lophobios cristata
intro: Lophobios cristata, also known as the Crested Hair Fern or the Golden Hair Fern, is a species of fern in the family Lophobiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a range of health issues, including inflammation, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Lophobios cristata include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant, which can help to protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Lophobios cristata is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to make remedies such as decoctions and poultices.
